title: aster boweri
intro: Aster boweri is a type of flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family. It is native to the mountainous regions of China and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it beneficial for reducing pain and inflammation, as well as protecting against cell damage. The leaves and roots of the Aster boweri plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
